title: hebe colensoi var. hillii
intro: Hebe colensoi var. hillii, also known as a New Zealand native plant, is a variety of the Hebe colensoi species, which is a type of flowering shrub belonging to the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Hebe colensoi var. hillii has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
